⚠ One scenario income still approximate
Scenario H remains an estimate. All other scenarios have been updated to verified sources.
Scenario C — Sole parent + 1 child
✓ Updated to $738/wk — PPS $1,055.90/fn + FTB Part A $227.36/fn + FTB Part B $193.34/fn (child <5, max rates, Oct 2025). Source: servicesaustralia.gov.au
Scenario D — Couple + 2 children
✓ Updated to $1,759/wk — ABS Census 2021 Victorian median total household income (QuickStats). For current estimate use ABS Survey of Income and Housing 2022-23.
Scenario E — Key worker (nurse/teacher)
✓ Updated to $1,575/wk — midpoint of RN Gr2 Yr1 $1,619/wk (Nurses & Midwives EBA 2024-28) and grad teacher $1,530/wk (VGSA 2022). Source: otr.anmfvic.asn.au / education.vic.gov.au
Scenario G — Graduate professional
✓ Updated to $1,436/wk — ABS Average Weekly Earnings national median, all employees (May 2025). Individual graduate earnings may vary. Source: abs.gov.au/statistics/labour/earnings-and-working-conditions/average-weekly-earnings-australia
Scenario H — Low-income couple
[ Retained at $1,600/wk — approx. one full-time + one part-time at min wage ($23.23/hr). Two full-time min wage = $1,765/wk. Adjust if specific hours/award known. Source: fairwork.gov.au/pay-and-wages/minimum-wages ]
📊 Data sources
Suburb polygon boundaries
✓ ABS ASGS 2021 — Suburbs & Localities (SAL) Shapefile, GDA2020 · 105 Victorian suburbs embedded
Rental prices (suburb-level)
✓ Homes Victoria Rental Report, Sep Q 2025 (DFFH/CAV) · median rents by dwelling type aligned to SQM categories: All Units, 2BR Unit, All Houses, 3BR House
Suburb-level household income
✓ ABS Census 2021 — G02 Median total household income (weekly), SAL level · used in Scenario I
Government payment rates
✓ DSS Schedule of Rates, Mar 2025 — Scenarios A (JobSeeker), C (Parenting Payment + FTB), F (Age Pension)
Minimum wage
✓ Fair Work Commission 2024–25 — $23.23/hr × 38hrs = $882.74/wk · Scenario B
Social housing waitlist pressure
✓ DFFH Social Housing & Homelessness Service Delivery Data 2024–25 — total social housing dwellings by LGA at 30 June 2025
Purchase market — mortgage repayments
✓ SQM Apr 2026 regional prices × ABS 2021 suburb-level mortgage index — differentiated suburb estimates. Replace with Vic Property Sales Report for actual medians.
Purchase market — current sale prices
✓ SQM Research asking prices by Victorian region (17 zones), April 2026. Mortgage calc: 6.2% p.a., 20% deposit, 30yr. Upload LGA-level data for finer resolution.
Load updated ABS boundaries
To update boundaries: abs.gov.au → ASGS digital boundary files → Suburbs and Localities (SAL) → Shapefile → convert and upload here
Methodology: 30% gross income rule (housing stress threshold).
Rental data: Homes Victoria Sep Q 2025 · Boundaries: ABS ASGS 2021.
Income: ABS Census 2021 G02 · Prototype — not for publication.
